title: [MTR4] UK eCitaro One Door Conversion
description:
This resource pack adds a custom one-door eCitaro variant, edited and modified by me for improved realism and compatibility.

The original eCitaro model was created by NonPlayerCharacter.
body:
Edited for the UK market using the original eCitaro model by NonPlayerCharacter. This version includes UK-style features, adjustments, and modifications for a realistic British setup. For UK operations.

original pack
